rows.label: qev018891_MSG0001
rows.name:
Lots of BLADEs have died on the
battlefield. There aren't many
of the old-time veterans left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0002
rows.name:
So this is the ideal time to begin
actively recruiting new members
from among our xenoform allies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmm. You there! You've got a look
on your face like you know a great
deal about these xenoforms![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0004
rows.name:
...What do you mean, "What kind of look is
that?" When I speak to you, the only thing I
want to hear back is "YES, SIR!" Is that clear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0005
rows.name:
Now, I want you to introduce me to physically
fit xenoforms who would make promising BLADE
operative candidates. ...Right now, soldier![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest Heradot[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Wolf about the Ma-non with exceptional reflexes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_JNK0020
rows.name: Decline[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_SEL0021
rows.name: Claim that no good candidates come to mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0006
rows.name:
How's that? You know a Ma-non that
is extremely physically fit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0007
rows.name:
There's a shark hiding
in that sea of shrimp?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0008
rows.name:
So be it! I shall attempt
to recruit this...Heradot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0009
rows.name:
And once I do, I will whip her into
a BLADE that NLA can be proud of![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0010
rows.name:
Hmph. So once again we will need to
rely on my own uncanny eye for talent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0011
rows.name:
So be it. When I can find the time,
I will board the Ma-non ship and
begin my hunt for a worthy BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0012
rows.name:
Turning weaklings into BLADEs is
my destiny, and one way or another,
I will see it fulfilled![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Wolf about the Ma-non
with exceptional reflexes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_JNK0030
rows.name: Suggest Gi Zang[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell Wolf about the Larsian with incredible combat Arts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0013
rows.name:
What?! You know a great Larsian
who can split into copies and
attack a foe from multiple sides?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0014
rows.name:
He would be a better candidate for
BLADE than I'd dared hope for! NLA's
security would be guaranteed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0015
rows.name:
And you say his name is Gi Zang? I
had no idea that so great a warrior
was lurking in our own city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018891_MSG0016
rows.name:
I will go to recruit him immediately.
Heh heh heh... I can't remember the
last time I was so excited![ST:wait ]
